subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Us unto him whom the breezes of revelation have stirred and who was among the assured ones, that he may rejoice in My remembrance of him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من لدنا لمن اخذته نفحات الوحی و کان من الموقنین لیفرح بذکری ایاه و
